content: Prove deployed code is 1:1 with GitHub (git diff) + fix admin login confusion
Smoke-test public storefront + CRM + security endpoints (physical proof)
Comprehensive end-to-end audit via testing agent (all 4 roles, RBAC/security, 2FA, Stripe, Ringostat, key CRM flows)
Fix any issues found in the audit
Final audit report with physical confirmation
